name: list_boards
description: List all boards the user has access to

name: list_workspaces
description: List all workspaces the user has access to

name: set_active_board
description: Set the active board for future operations

boardId.description: ID of the board to set as active

name: set_active_workspace
description: Set the active workspace for future operations

workspaceId.description: ID of the workspace to set as active

name: get_active_board_info
description: Get information about the currently active board

name: create_board
description: Create a new Trello board, optionally within a workspace

idOrganization.description: Workspace ID to create the board in

defaultLabels.description: Whether to add default labels to the board

defaultLists.description: Whether to add default lists (To Do, Doing, Done)

name: list_boards_in_workspace
description: List all boards in a specific workspace

workspaceId.description: ID of the workspace to list boards for

name: get_card
description: Get detailed information about a specific Trello card

cardId.description: ID of the card to retrieve

name: get_cards_by_list_id
description: Fetch cards from a specific Trello list on a board

listId.description: ID of the list to get cards from

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: add_card_to_list
description: Add a new card to a specified list

listId.description: ID of the list to add the card to

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

dueDate.description: Due date for the card (ISO 8601 format)

start.description: Start date for the card (ISO 8601 format)

labels.description: Label IDs to add to the card

name: update_card_details
description: Update an existing card's details

cardId.description: ID of the card to update

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

dueComplete.description: Whether the due date is marked complete

name: archive_card
description: Send a card to the archive

cardId.description: ID of the card to archive

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: move_card
description: Move a card to a different list

cardId.description: ID of the card to move

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: get_my_cards
description: Fetch all cards assigned to the current user

name: get_card_history
description: Get the history and actions of a specific card

cardId.description: ID of the card to get history for

limit.description: Maximum number of actions to return

name: get_lists
description: Retrieve all lists from the specified board

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: add_list_to_board
description: Add a new list to the specified board

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: archive_list
description: Send a list to the archive

listId.description: ID of the list to archive

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: get_recent_activity
description: Fetch recent activity on the Trello board

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

limit.description: Maximum number of activity items to return

name: add_comment
description: Add a comment to a card

cardId.description: ID of the card to comment on

name: update_comment
description: Update an existing comment with new text

commentId.description: ID of the comment to update

text.description: New text content for the comment

name: delete_comment
description: Delete a comment from a card

commentId.description: ID of the comment to delete

name: get_card_comments
description: Retrieve all comments from a card

cardId.description: ID of the card to get comments from

limit.description: Maximum number of comments to return

name: create_checklist
description: Create a new checklist on a card

cardId.description: ID of the card to add the checklist to

name: get_checklist_items
description: Get all items from a checklist by name

name.description: Name of the checklist to get items from

cardId.description: ID of the card containing the checklist

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: add_checklist_item
description: Add a new item to a checklist

checkListName.description: Name of the checklist to add the item to

cardId.description: ID of the card containing the checklist

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: get_checklist_by_name
description: Get a complete checklist with all items and completion percentage

name.description: Name of the checklist to retrieve

cardId.description: ID of the card containing the checklist

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: update_checklist_item
description: Update a checklist item state (complete or incomplete)

cardId.description: ID of the card containing the checklist

checkItemId.description: ID of the checklist item to update

state.description: New state for the checklist item

name: get_acceptance_criteria
description: Get all items from the Acceptance Criteria checklist on a card

cardId.description: ID of the card to get acceptance criteria from

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: find_checklist_items_by_description
description: Search checklist items containing specific text

description.description: Text to search for in checklist items

cardId.description: ID of the card to search in

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: get_board_members
description: Get all members of a specific board

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: assign_member_to_card
description: Assign a member to a specific card

cardId.description: ID of the card to assign the member to

memberId.description: ID of the member to assign

name: remove_member_from_card
description: Remove a member from a specific card

cardId.description: ID of the card to remove the member from

memberId.description: ID of the member to remove

name: get_board_labels
description: Get all labels of a specific board

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: create_label
description: Create a new label on a board

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: update_label
description: Update an existing label's name or color

labelId.description: ID of the label to update

name: delete_label
description: Delete a label from a board

labelId.description: ID of the label to delete

name: attach_image_to_card
description: Attach an image to a card from a URL

cardId.description: ID of the card to attach the image to

imageUrl.description: URL of the image to attach

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: attach_file_to_card
description: Attach any file to a card from a URL

cardId.description: ID of the card to attach the file to

fileUrl.description: URL of the file to attach

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: attach_image_data_to_card
description: Attach an image from base64 data to a card

cardId.description: ID of the card to attach the image to

boardId.description: ID of the board (uses active board if omitted)

name: get_health
description: Get basic health status of the MCP server

name: get_health_detailed
description: Get detailed health status including all subsystems

name: get_health_metadata
description: Get server metadata and configuration health information

name: get_health_performance
description: Get server performance metrics and health statistics

name: perform_system_repair
description: Attempt to repair any detected system health issues
